title: P2: Add goal-identity guard in ProvisionGoalIfCreativeAsync
description:
ProvisionGoalIfCreativeAsync has no `_currentGoal == goal` guard between loop iterations. If the goal changes during provisioning, the old goal's /give commands continue to be enqueued. While /give is idempotent, the final GetStatus at the end of provisioning can clear the new goal's stale-inventory flag prematurely.

Related to P0-5 (CancellationToken.None). Fix: Add `if (_currentGoal != goal) return;` at the top of each provisioning iteration.

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — P2-7 [PR]
